banner_matchers.value:
^SIP/2\.0 \d\d\d .*
Call-ID: 50000
CSeq: 42 OPTIONS
From: <sip:nm@nm>;tag=root
To: <sip:nm2@nm2>
Via: SIP/2\.0/TCP nm;branch=foo;received=[^;
]+;rport=\d+
Contact: <sip:[^>]+>;\+sip\.instance="<urn:uuid:[a-f\d]{8}-[a-f\d]{4}-[a-f\d]{4}-[a-f\d]{4}-[a-f\d]{12}>"
Allow: INVITE, ACK, CANCEL, BYE, NOTIFY, INFO, MESSAGE, UPDATE
Content-Length: 0

notes: Genere depuis nmap-service-probes. Service: sip-proxy. 1 match(es), 0 softmatch(es). CPE: cpe:2.3:a:ibm:notes:*:*:*:*:*:*:*:*
